text.title: AI Pair-Coding Prompt Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes task category → pattern → stop conditions to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: task is new feature OR refactor OR fix OR spike?

conclusion.verdict: pattern=test-first; lock behaviour with table-driven tests
pattern=refactor-isolate; rename in one commit, logic changes separate
pattern=repo-grep; locate exact call sites before changing
pattern=branch-canary; throwaway branch + explicit kill criteria
